query:
-- Fix WEST region games (217-224) to March 20: wisconsin, arkansas, gonzaga, georgia + long_island, utah_st, BYU/texas, miami_fl, purdue
UPDATE games SET gameDate = '2026-03-20'
WHERE id IN (1830091, 1830092, 1830093, 1830094)
AND sport = 'NCAAM';
